# Dumbbell

## Tags
barbell, weight, workout, gym

## Categories
navigation, sports

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/dumbbell)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Dumbbell;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Dumbbell { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
